title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 19 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 19 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 19 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/12/2025
Dalian iron ore futures continued to fluctuate with a firm tone today. The main contract, I2605, ultimately closed at 780, up 0.52% from theprevious working day. Traders sold cargoes at prevailing market rates, whilst steel mills procured strictly on a needs basis.
